title: mimi sentry as copper golem
description: replaces copper golem with mimi sentry
body:
requires EMF/ETF
pack replaces copper golem with mimi sentry created by
_correct me if im wrong_
[**these awesome people**](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2970467179)

note: this pack might be prone to bugs, due to the fact that the copper golem model is not yet officially supported by EMF
